Description.value: Fixes vanilla bug where food/drink tooltips show all CVar-based stats (foodAmountAdd, foodHealthAmount, $wakaProtein etc.) as 0 after MinEventParams.CachedEventParam.Self gets set to null by some game event. Harmony Prefix on XUiM_ItemStack.GetCustomDisplayValueForItem ensures Self is restored to the local player before tooltip iteration, so triggered_effect ModifyCVar CanExecute checks pass consistently. Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony). EAC must be off.
